title: The post-May '68 Christian philosophy now being embraced by the American far right
subhed: Trump supporters often blame the cultural upheavals triggered by the May 1968 protests in France for sowing the seeds of 'wokeness.' Yet some of them are now claiming a different French school of thought, which took shape at Stanford University under the influence of René Girard.

Authorities investigate safety lapses after China coal mine blast kills at least 82
subhed: Rescuers continued to search on Sunday for those missing following the country's deadliest coal mine explosion in recent years. Local officials reported that the coal mine located in the northern city of Changzhi had 'seriously' violated the law, but did not elaborate.

title: Essayist Paul Klotz: With the Enhanced Games, 'we are witnessing the return of the circus'
subhed: By pitting doped athletes against each other under medical supervision, the Enhanced Games – funded by leading figures in American transhumanism – mark the beginning of a human modification economy.

title: Djokovic fights through tough Roland Garros opener
subhed: The 39-year-old Novak Djokovic battled the big-serving Frenchman Giovanni Mpetshi Perricard as the clay-court Grand Slam got underway on Sunday.

title: Economist Guillaume Vallet: 'The Enhanced Games glorifies a certain type of man, dominant and celebrated by MAGA ideology'
subhed: In an interview, the economics professor analyzes this competition between doped athletes, scheduled for May 24 in Las Vegas. Advocating for an unregulated market logic, these unprecedented Games in the history of sport introduce a new paradigm of confrontation, outside the democratic framework.

An Iranian's struggle to become French and to study at Harvard
subhed: This musicology graduate has been living in France for the past 10 years and was recently accepted into a PhD program at Harvard, but after his French citizenship application was inexplicably closed, he might have to give up his plans.

title: Raul Castro is still pulling the strings in Cuba
subhed: At nearly 95 years old, Raul Castro, the former Cuban president who was indicted Wednesday in the United States for the killing of Americans, remains a central figure in Cuban politics. Washington appears to be using the same playbook it used in Venezuela to try to topple the regime.

title: Tamil cinema superstar Vijay makes spectacular political debut in India
subhed: Actor Joseph Vijay Chandrasekhar has stunned the country by winning regional elections in Tamil Nadu. The 51-year-old relied on his millions of fans and campaigned on a platform of change.
